chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D-4385 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For order as to non-prosecution. -------------- 01.10.2024. None present ---------- None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation received. This is a time fixed matter at 11:30 A.M. whereas, on the very first date, the Petitioner had obtained a restraining order; but neither the cost has been paid nor copies have been supplied. In view of such position, it appears that the Petitioner is not interested in this matter. Accordingly, petition is dismissed for non-prosecution with pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
